seo.site_title: Jewish Summer Day Camp in Southern Delaware | Kosher Culinary Camp 2026
seo.site_description: Jewish summer day camp in Southern Delaware for ages 4-12. Kosher Culinary Camp at Chabad of Southern Delaware in Lewes, DE, August 3-7, 2026, with cooking, baking, trips, water play, and Jewish values.

sections.faq_body: For anything else, reach out to Chanale.

faq.question: What are the camp dates and hours?
faq.answer: Camp runs Monday-Friday, August 3-7, 2026, from 9:00 AM to 3:00 PM.

faq.question: What will the kids do?
faq.answer: Campers enjoy a week filled with hands-on kosher cooking and baking, exciting outings, water fun, games, and creative activities. Core Jewish values and traditions are woven naturally into each day's experiences.

faq.question: Is this a Jewish summer camp for Southern Delaware families?
faq.answer: Yes. Kosher Culinary Camp is a Jewish summer day camp for families in Sussex County.

faq.question: How do I register?
faq.answer:
Use the registration page to complete the secure camp form. For help, reach out to Chanale directly:

Chanale Vogel
718-473-6570
Chanale@JewishSouthernDelaware.com
